## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies for accelerating growth and moving upmarket](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to significantly invest to achieve ambitious growth target of $60M next year](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Transitioning to enterprise/upmarket motion is a company-wide initiative, not just sales & marketing](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Current team, processes, and investments likely insufficient for desired acceleration](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Balancing investment with marketing efficiency will be critical](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

## Topics

### Growth Targets and Investment Required

  - [Goal to grow from $30M to $60M next year is very ambitious](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Estimated $15M additional investment may be needed to hit target](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Pipeline being generated now is already for Q1 next year, so urgency is high](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Upmarket Enterprise Motion

  - [Shifting to enterprise/upmarket is a major undertaking across the company](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Took 2 years of effort to optimize current SMB product-led growth motion](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Replicating that success with enterprise in a compressed timeframe is extremely difficult](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Balancing Growth Investment and Efficiency

  - [Previous 18 months focused on improving marketing/sales efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Now need to "go all out" with investment, while maintaining efficiency gains](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Spending more for growth vs. optimizing spend efficiency will be an ongoing tradeoff](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

## Next Steps

  - Determine viable growth targets and required investment for next year
  - Align entire company on upmarket transition as a strategic priority
  - [Explore untapped growth levers from previous roadmap descopes](https://fathom.video/share/Zc47Z-7znhEfyZy727z7ndxzf9yxCBm2?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - Develop plan to balance aggressive growth investment with continued efficiency
